title: stelis radicans
intro: Stelis radicans is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, also known as the 'Racemose Stelis' due to its cluster of small flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis radicans include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various ways of harnessing its medicinal properties.
